scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: अरे मनोज, रुक रुक! सुना है तेरी नई जॉब लग गई? वो भी इतने अच्छे पैकेज पर? [Hey Manoj, wait wait! Heard you got a new job? That too with such a good package?]
Character A says: पर तेरी इंग्लिश तो... मेरा मतलब, तूने इंटरव्यू कैसे क्लियर किया? [But your English... I mean, how did you clear the interview?]
Character B says: किसने कहा मुझे इंग्लिश नहीं आती? मैंने रोज़ practice करके अपनी इंग्लिश improve की है। [Who said I don't know English? I improved my English by practicing daily.]
Character B says: और देख, जॉब भी मिल गई। [And see, I got the job too.]
Character A says: सच में? इतनी जल्दी इंग्लिश बोलना कैसे सीख लिया तूने? [Really? How did you learn to speak English so quickly?]
Character B says: एक सीक्रेट है, बताता हूँ। [There's a secret, I'll tell you.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer with a relatable scenario: a friend getting a good job despite past English struggles.
- Establishes the core problem (English holding back career progress).
- Sets up the reveal of the solution without overpromising an exact timeframe.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:

scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: Supernova ऐप। [Supernova app.]
Character A says: क्या? Supernova ऐप? इससे कैसे सीखा? [What? Supernova app? How did you learn from this?]
Character B says: इस ऐप में AI ट्यूटर होते हैं। एकदम दोस्त की तरह, बिना जज किए इंग्लिश बोलना सिखाते हैं। [In this app, there are AI tutors. Just like a friend, they teach you to speak English without judging.]
Character B says: बस रोज़ 10-15 मिनट बोलकर practice करनी होती है। धीरे-धीरे confidence अपने आप आ जाता है। [You just have to practice speaking for 10-15 minutes daily. Slowly, the confidence comes on its own.]
Character A says: अच्छा, सच में काम करता है? [Oh, does it really work?]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Introduces Supernova as the core solution.
- Highlights the AI tutor feature as a non-judgmental, safe space to practice.
- Emphasizes the practicality of daily 10-15 minute lessons to build confidence.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: जब हम फालतू रील्स देखते हैं ना, तब मैं इस ऐप पर practice कर रहा था। [When we watch useless reels, I was practicing on this app.]
Character B says: इसमें रियल-लाइफ situations होती हैं। जैसे मैनेजर से कैसे बात करें... कस्टमर को कैसे हैंडल करें... या ऑफिस फ्रेंड्स के साथ कैसे बोलें... [It has real-life situations. Like how to talk to the manager... how to handle a customer... or how to speak with office friends...]
Character B says: मुझे खुद यकीन नहीं हुआ कि मेरी स्पोकन इंग्लिश इतनी जल्दी इतनी बेहतर हो जाएगी। [I couldn't believe myself that my spoken English would get this much better so quickly.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Details Supernova's specific value prop: real-world speaking scenarios.
- Connects the learning process to everyday career situations (manager, customer, colleagues).
- Delivers the emotional payoff of personal growth and fluency without aggressive hype.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: यार, मैं तो इंग्लिश की वजह से हर इंटरव्यू में रिजेक्ट हो रही हूँ। [Man, I am getting rejected in every interview because of English.]
Character A says: क्या मैं भी तुम्हारी तरह इस ऐप से इंग्लिश बोलना सीख सकती हूँ? [Can I also learn to speak English from this app like you?]
Character B says: बिल्कुल! आज ही Supernova ऐप डाउनलोड कर। बहुत affordable है, और तेरी इंग्लिश की झिझक एकदम दूर हो जाएगी। [Absolutely! Download the Supernova app today. It's very affordable, and your hesitation with English will completely go away.]
[music only, no speech]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Reiterates the pain point (interview rejection) to drive urgency.
- Provides a warm, encouraging call to action from a peer.
- Replaces the competitor's '100% job guarantee' with a realistic promise of removing hesitation and being affordable.
